expectations.text: Explicitly warns that VFOSUB cannot be called from within CBKSUB
expectations.evidence: response.md: "VFOSUB is on CBKSUB's forbidden call list" — direct call from CBKSUB is clearly prohibited

expectations.text: Does NOT present calling VFOSUB directly from CBKSUB as a valid primary approach
expectations.evidence: response.md never presents direct call as valid; immediately redirects to caching alternative

expectations.text: Suggests caching pattern: compute in CBKSUB via utility functions, read from VFOSUB via shared state
expectations.evidence: cbksub.c implements full caching pattern with file-scope global struct holding precomputed values; vfosub.c reads the cache

expectations.text: Uses ev_ITERATION_BEG enum constant (not raw integer) when showing the caching alternative
expectations.evidence: cbksub.c: case ev_ITERATION_BEG: — enum constant used in the switch statement

expectations.text: Uses c_sysary or c_sysfnc (allowed utility routines) for computation inside CBKSUB
expectations.evidence: cbksub.c: c_sysary( "TDISP", ... ) used to compute displacement at ev_ITERATION_BEG
